subject: WM-0130 ready for review
body: Audited post-M8 UI interaction/i18n state; default launch is player-facing but fixture-backed, zh-CN HUD still leaks English read-model prose, drag/reset camera controls are absent, small-viewport evidence is reachability-only, and minimum playable gameplay interaction remains blocked by protocol/UI adapter gaps. Required checks pass; WM-0118 artifact refreshes from verification were restored because they are outside WM-0130 allowedPaths.
